title: THE TORTURED POETS DEPARTMENT
notes: I was angry listening to this album. I was angry that it was such a fucking nothing burger. Its bad. This album is 14 boring, same old, do-nothing songs with 'Florida!!' and 'I Can Do It With A Broken Heart' tacked on at the end.
highlights: Florida!! is a fun song, but I would hesitate to really credit Taylor for it because it sounds like a Florence and the Machine tune. Be that as it may, it's a welcome change of tempo and pace and brings a single drop of creative energy or two.
lowlights: I don't know how to concisely describe how bad this album is. 14 songs have uninspiring (if not outright harmful and reductive) lyrics, no real energy or dynamic chagnes, and do not deviate from the same background instrument. You are lucky to hear a new instrument added in the chorus. If you aren't falling asleep because of the lilting melody, you are actively listening to someone tell you 'Everything comes out teenage petulance \ Fuck it if I can't have him \ I might just die, it would make no difference' and I don't know which is worse.
